name: openspec_artifact_drain
description: One pass of openspec_plan's artifact-generation drain loop, extracted into its own sub-workflow: Conductor does not support a DO_WHILE nested directly inside another DO_WHILE (confirmed live and in docs — 'Nested Do While tasks are not supported... use a Sub Workflow task inside the Do While task'). Repeatedly calls openspec_status, JQ-selects not-yet-generated-this-pass artifacts with status != blocked, and fans out openspec_generate_artifact sub-workflows for them, until nothing new is selectable.

inputParameters.queryExpression: .repoPath as $r | .changeName as $cn | .feedback as $fb | .goal as $g | .agent as $ag | .model as $m | .maxTurns as $mt | .maxBudgetUsd as $mb | (.generated // []) as $gen | ((.status.artifacts // []) | map(select(.status != "blocked" and ((.id as $i | ($gen | index($i))) == null)))) as $ready | { dynamicTasks: [$ready[] | {name:"openspec_generate_artifact", taskReferenceName: ("gen_" + .id), type:"SUB_WORKFLOW", subWorkflowParam:{name:"openspec_generate_artifact", version:1}}], dynamicTasksInput: (reduce $ready[] as $a ({}; . + {(("gen_" + $a.id)): {repoPath:$r, changeName:$cn, artifact:$a.id, goal:$g, feedback:$fb, agent:$ag, model:$m, maxTurns:$mt, maxBudgetUsd:$mb}})), readyIds: [$ready[].id], readyCount: ($ready | length) }

.prevGenerated as $pg | .prevFiles as $pf | .prevCost as $pc | .prevTokens as $pt | .readyIds as $rid | (.fanOutput // {}) as $fo | ($fo | to_entries | map(.value.output // .value // {})) as $vals | (if ($rid|length) > 0 then ([$vals[].filesChanged] | add // []) else $pf end) as $files | (if ($rid|length) > 0 then ((([$vals[].costUsd] | map(if type=="number" then . else 0 end) | add) // 0) + ($pc // 0)) else $pc end) as $cost | (if ($rid|length) > 0 then ((([$vals[].tokenUsed] | map(if type=="number" then . else 0 end) | add) // 0) + ($pt // 0)) else $pt end) as $tokens | { generated: (($pg + $rid) | unique), filesChanged: $files, costUsd: $cost, tokenUsed: $tokens }
